name: Jm Associates
description_short: JM Associates is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Jacksonville, FL, offering savings accounts, CDs, and loan products to JM Family Enterprises associates and their families.
description_long:
JM Associates Federal Credit Union was established in 1980 and is headquartered at 9987 Pritchard Road in Jacksonville, Florida. It is an NCUA-insured, federally chartered institution (Charter #23709) with approximately $144.06 million in assets. The credit union operates with a restricted field of membership, requiring applicants to be associates of JM Family Enterprises, Inc., its majority-owned subsidiaries, or immediate family members of existing or potential members. This membership structure reflects its origins as a workplace-based credit union.

JM Associates offers a range of deposit and loan products typical of community credit unions. On the deposit side, they provide savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms ranging from 6 months to 5 years. Savings accounts offer 0.40% APY with a $2,500 minimum, while CD rates range from 0.60% (6-month) to 1.16% APY (5-year). They also offer Variable IRA accounts starting at 0.60% APY. Loan products include mortgages (15-year and 30-year), home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), auto loans, personal loans, and home equity loans, though specific loan rates were not publicly available at the time of this profile.

What distinguishes JM Associates is its status as a member-owned credit union serving a specific corporate family and their dependents, which creates a tight-knit member base with aligned financial interests. The institution maintains a relatively stable deposit base of $124.84 million against $99.12 million in loans, indicating conservative lending practices. As a federally chartered credit union, it provides NCUA deposit insurance protection up to $250,000 per account category, which is a key consumer protection feature. The credit union's asset size places it in the small-to-mid range, allowing for personalized service while maintaining regulatory compliance and safety standards.

Honestly assessed, JM Associates is best suited for eligible members of the JM Family Enterprises ecosystem rather than the general public. The restrictive membership requirement is a significant limiting factor for most consumers. The deposit rates (0.40% savings, 1.16% max CD) are competitive but not exceptional compared to some online banks and credit unions as of 2026. Loan rates were unavailable on the website, making it difficult to assess their competitiveness. For eligible members, the credit union offers the standard benefits of credit union membership: personalized service, member ownership structure, and NCUA insurance, but potential members should compare rates with other local and online options. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) ranging from 6 months to 5 years maturity
Variable IRA accounts with competitive rates
Checking accounts (referenced but rates not displayed)
Multiple branch locations in the Jacksonville, FL area
pros: NCUA insured institution providing deposit protection up to $250,000 per account category
Member-owned credit union structure, meaning members own a stake in the institution
Established in 1980 with $144.06 million in assets, demonstrating long-term stability
Offers multiple deposit products including savings accounts, CDs with various terms, and IRA accounts
Conservative loan-to-deposit ratio ($99.12M loans vs $124.84M deposits) indicates financial stability
Federally chartered (Charter #23709) with regulatory oversight and compliance
Provides access to mortgages, HELOCs, auto loans, and personal loans for members
cons: Highly restrictive membership eligibility limited to JM Family Enterprises associates and immediate family only
Deposit rates are relatively low compared to some online banks and competitors (0.40% savings APY)
Specific loan rates are not publicly available on their profile, making rate comparison difficult
No loan rates displayed on the website at the time of profile creation
Limited geographic footprint as a small regional credit union based in Jacksonville, FL
best_for: Current and prospective employees of JM Family Enterprises seeking member-owned banking with NCUA insurance
Immediate family members of JM Associates members looking to maintain banking within a credit union structure
Members seeking CD ladder strategies with NCUA protection and federally insured accounts
diagnosis: JM Associates is appropriate only for eligible members of JM Family Enterprises and their immediate family members; the restrictive membership requirement makes it unavailable to the general public. Eligible members should compare JM Associates' rates and terms with other credit unions and banks before opening accounts, as the publicly available deposit rates are modest compared to some online alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
